script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
KAYE_OID=53ef6cdf-3955-4ba5-a361-cef88ea6071a
ZIP=/home/azureuser/kaye-teams-app.zip

echo '=== STEP 1: Mint AppPublisher token ==='
RT_AP=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token-appcatalog --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
AT_AP=$(curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=9f4cd925-fcc7-4f42-8dc2-ae98bcad28a6" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" \
  --data-urlencode "refresh_token=$RT_AP" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access" \
  2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
if [ ${#AT_AP} -lt 200 ]; then
  echo "FAIL: AppPublisher token mint produced ${#AT_AP} chars. STOP."; exit 1
fi
echo "  AppPublisher token: ${#AT_AP} chars"

echo '=== STEP 2: POST manifest zip to /appCatalogs/teamsApps (single shot, no retry) ==='
RESP=$(curl -sS -w '\n__HTTP_CODE__:%{http_code}' -X POST \
  "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT_AP" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/zip" \
  --data-binary @"$ZIP")
HTTP_CODE=$(echo "$RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP_CODE__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2)
BODY=$(echo "$RESP" | sed -e 's/__HTTP_CODE__:[0-9]*$//')
echo "  POST status: $HTTP_CODE"
echo "  POST body (first 600 chars): $(echo "$BODY" | head -c 600)"
if [ "$HTTP_CODE" != "201" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: upload returned $HTTP_CODE (expected 201). STOP. Do NOT retry."; exit 1
fi
NEW_APP_ID=$(echo "$BODY" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("id",""))')
if [ -z "$NEW_APP_ID" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: no app id in 201 response body. STOP."; exit 1
fi
echo "  NEW teamsApp.id: $NEW_APP_ID"

echo '=== STEP 3: Poll GET /appCatalogs/teamsApps/{id} up to 5 min ==='
PUBLISHED=no
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  GET_CODE=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/get_resp -w '%{http_code}' \
    "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$NEW_APP_ID" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT_AP")
  if [ "$GET_CODE" = "200" ]; then
    echo "  attempt $i: GET 200 — PUBLISHED"; PUBLISHED=yes; break
  fi
  echo "  attempt $i: GET $GET_CODE (waiting 10s)"
  sleep 10
done
if [ "$PUBLISHED" != "yes" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: did not publish within 5 minutes. STOP. Do NOT retry."
  echo "  teamsApp.id created but unreachable: $NEW_APP_ID"; exit 1
fi
echo '  published app details:'
cat /tmp/get_resp | python3 -m json.tool 2>&1 | head -25

echo '=== STEP 4: Mint YooMD chat token for install ==='
RT_YM=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
AT_YM=$(curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" \
  --data-urlencode "refresh_token=$RT_YM" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=https://graph.microsoft.com/.default offline_access" \
  2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
if [ ${#AT_YM} -lt 200 ]; then
  echo "FAIL: YooMD token mint failed. App is PUBLISHED but install cannot proceed."
  echo "  Save this teamsApp.id for retry: $NEW_APP_ID"; exit 1
fi
echo "  YooMD token: ${#AT_YM} chars"

echo '=== STEP 5: Install app for Kaye ==='
INST_RESP=$(curl -sS -w '\n__HTTP_CODE__:%{http_code}' -X POST \
  "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/$KAYE_OID/teamwork/installedApps" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT_YM" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"teamsApp@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$NEW_APP_ID\"}")
INST_CODE=$(echo "$INST_RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP_CODE__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2)
INST_BODY=$(echo "$INST_RESP" | sed -e 's/__HTTP_CODE__:[0-9]*$//')
echo "  Install POST status: $INST_CODE"
echo "  Install body: $(echo "$INST_BODY" | head -c 500)"
if [ "$INST_CODE" != "201" ] && [ "$INST_CODE" != "200" ] && [ "$INST_CODE" != "409" ]; then
  echo "WARN: install returned $INST_CODE. Per playbook Rule 2, do NOT retry. Check GET first."
fi

echo '=== STEP 6: Verify install record (Kaye sees this app) ==='
NEW_APP_ID="$NEW_APP_ID" curl -sS -G "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/$KAYE_OID/teamwork/installedApps" \
  --data-urlencode '$expand=teamsApp' \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT_YM" 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import json,sys,os
try:
  d=json.load(sys.stdin)
  if d.get("error"):
    print("  ERROR:", d["error"])
  else:
    apps=d.get("value",[])
    print(f"  Total installed apps for Kaye: {len(apps)}")
    target=os.environ.get("NEW_APP_ID","")
    match=[a for a in apps if (a.get("teamsApp") or {}).get("id")==target]
    if match:
      ta=match[0]["teamsApp"]
      print(f"  MATCH: name={ta.get(\"displayName\")} dist={ta.get(\"distributionMethod\")} id={ta.get(\"id\")}")
      print("  INSTALL SUCCESS")
    else:
      print("  NO MATCH: install record not visible yet (may be eventually consistent — wait 1-2 min then re-check)")
except Exception as e: print("  parse-err:", e)'

echo '=== SAVE THESE FOR FUTURE VERSION BUMPS ==='
echo "  Kaye teamsApp.id:    $NEW_APP_ID"
echo "  Manifest externalId: 515f7dd8-cede-4e89-8012-a861e0a71f3d"
echo "  Next update path:    POST /v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$NEW_APP_ID/appDefinitions"
echo '===END==='
